Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Embracing Bayesian methods in clinical trials 79 upvotes, 8 comments
  2. Solving Semantle with the Wrong Embeddings 17 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. ISBN Visualization 96 upvotes, 14 comments
  4. Colorado House passes bill to limit surveillance pricing and wage setting 34 upvotes, 3 comments
  5. Explore the Hidden World of Sand 178 upvotes, 35 comments
  6. Capability-Based Security for Redox: Namespace and CWD as Capabilities 31 upvotes, 3 comments
  7. Meow.camera 192 upvotes, 46 comments
  8. Velxio 2.0 – Emulate Arduino, ESP32, and Raspberry Pi 3 in the Browser 92 upvotes, 19 comments
  9. Installing a Let's Encrypt TLS certificate on a Brother printer with Certbot 188 upvotes, 48 comments
  10. Improving Composer through real-time RL 51 upvotes, 9 comments
  11. Building FireStriker: Making Civic Tech Free 90 upvotes, 20 comments
  12. Nashville library launches Memory Lab for digitizing home movies 104 upvotes, 26 comments
  13. Desk for people who work at home with a cat 330 upvotes, 128 comments
  14. Anatomy of the .claude/ folder 374 upvotes, 190 comments
  15. Type Construction and Cycle Detection 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  16. LG's new 1Hz display is the secret behind a new laptop's battery life 128 upvotes, 65 comments
  17. DOJ confirms FBI Director Kash Patel's personal email was hacked 179 upvotes, 99 comments
  18. Ask HN: Founders of estonian e-businesses – is it worth it? 90 upvotes, 47 comments
  19. Show HN: Twitch Roulette – Find live streamers who need views the most 51 upvotes, 25 comments
  20. The Future of SCIP 36 upvotes, 16 comments
  21. Make macOS consistently bad (unironically) 304 upvotes, 214 comments
  22. Fets and Crosses: Tic-Tac-Toe built from 2458 discrete transistors 15 upvotes, 5 comments
  23. People inside Microsoft are fighting to drop mandatory Microsoft Account 515 upvotes, 405 comments
  24. Hold on to Your Hardware 569 upvotes, 461 comments
  25. ‘Energy independence feels practical’: Europeans building mini solar farms 217 upvotes, 210 comments
  26. Automatically generate all 3D print files for organizing a drawer 24 upvotes, 15 comments
  27. Don't YOLO your file system 27 upvotes, 18 comments
  28. Telnyx package compromised on PyPI 89 upvotes, 98 comments
  29. 21,864 Yugoslavian .yu domains 78 upvotes, 99 comments
  30. Should QA exist? 100 upvotes, 133 comments
